calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement Agreement And Release Of Paga Claims Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2698 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF ROMULO CABRITO's Motion To Approve Settlement Agreement And Release Of PAGA Claims Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2698 Et Seq.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement agreement and release of PAGA claims is granted. The Court finds that the overall amount of the proposed settlement is fair and adequate in view of the purposes and policies of PAGA, taking into account such factors as the adequacy of the civil penalties in light of the potential maximum if the matter were to go to verdict and the risks of litigation. (Lab. Code sec 2699(l)(2); see Haralson v. U.S. Aviation Services Corp. (N.D. Cal. 2019) 383 F.Supp.3d 959, 972; O'Connor v. Uber Technologies, Inc. (N.D. Cal. 2016) 201 F.Supp.3d 1110, 1132-35.) The Court also finds that the proposed award of attorneys' fees, which represents 33% of the gross settlement amount of $250,000, and actual costs and expenses incurred not to exceed $15,000, is a reasonable amount in the circumstances of the case, including the result achieved, contingent risk, and counsel's lodestar. (See Laffitte v. Robert Half Int'l Inc. (2016) 1 Cal.5th 480.)

order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
